item.title: Blue Nile presents Kota Dosa
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-04-27T19:30:00.000-05:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.bluenilelive.com/
Kota Dosa is a creative music collective known for blending blues, funk, psychedelic rock, and jazz, with roots in New York, New Orleans, and Oregon. Led by brothers Jesse Jake and Cody Luke, the band features powerful vocals, guitar solos, and a notable horn section. They perform original music alongside influential covers and are recognized for their high-energy, genre-bending live shows.
AGES 21+. FREE ADMISSION WITH VALID I.D.

(This is a LATE SHOW Wednesday April 29. Technically this show starts early morning April 30.)
Advance Tickets $20 + Processing Fees & Applicable Taxes at Checkout.
2026 GRAMMY NOMINEES! New Breed Brass Band is the new sound of New Orleans, and its members have learned from the city's best including Troy “Trombone Shorty” Andrews and James “12” Andrews. New Breed takes the NOLA second-line brass band tradition to all-new places.

item.title: Laughs Unlimited: Thursdays at The Howlin' Wolf! Join us for an evening where laughter never ends!
item.description:

Comedy Gumbeaux is a New Orleans Comedy institution. Local, national, and even international comedians have graced our stage, and yet we have space in our “Rising Stars” section for anyone who is brave enough to take the mic. So come on out to get your laugh on or to make them laugh. Every Thursday night at the Howlin Wolf.

item.title: 19th Annual Backbeat JazzFest Series presents Flow Tribe
item.description:
Venue: Blue Nile Starts: 2026-04-30T20:30:00.000-07:00 Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other More info: https://www.showpass.com/flow-tribe-blue-nile-april-30-bbjfs/ Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/flow-tribe-blue-nile-april-30-bbjfs/
Thursday April 30
Doors 9:30PM / Show 10:30PM
Advance Tickets $20 + Processing Fees & Applicable Taxes at Checkout.
Founded in 2004, the band solidified in the wake of Hurricane Katrina's destruction with the mission to bring the next generation of the New Orleans' sound of unstoppable rhythm and passion to the world. The next 15 years would find Flow Tribe performing over 120 shows a year crossing the country multiple times from the biggest festival stages to freak shows. These are six seasoned blue collar musicians who grind out the good times. They carry on the road dog tradition of following the highway to wherever the next crowd congregates.
All sales are final and refunds are only allowed in limited circumstances such as canceled events. If your event is canceled, postponed, rescheduled, or moved, we will attempt to contact you to update you on the status of the event, and inform you of any refund, credit, or exchange procedures.
All shows are for ages 21 and up. Valid ID required upon entry.
